query: What is the standard return window?
ground_truth: 30 days from the delivery date

query: What's the return window for apparel?
ground_truth: 45 days, and items must have original tags attached

query: How long do I have to return a grocery item?
ground_truth: 7 days; perishable grocery items are non-returnable

query: Can I return an opened laptop after 20 days?
ground_truth: Yes, within the 30-day electronics window, but a 15% restocking fee applies to opened electronics

query: Is there a restocking fee on unopened electronics returned in time?
ground_truth: No. The 15% restocking fee applies only to opened electronic items

query: Can I return opened headphones?
ground_truth: No. Opened headphones, earbuds and personal grooming devices are non-returnable for hygiene reasons

query: My earbuds are opened but only 5 days old. Can I get a refund with the restocking fee?
ground_truth: No. Opened earbuds are non-returnable for hygiene; the restocking fee path does not apply

query: When does the return window start counting?
ground_truth: From the delivery date recorded by the carrier, not the order date

query: How long do refunds take to process?
ground_truth: Within 5 business days after the return is received and inspected

query: Who pays return shipping for a standard return?
ground_truth: The customer pays return shipping for standard returns; Zava pays for damaged, defective or incorrect items

query: How many days do I have to report a damaged item?
ground_truth: Within 14 days of delivery

query: Is a damaged item subject to the restocking fee?
ground_truth: No. Damaged or defective items are exempt from the restocking fee

query: What is the free shipping threshold?
ground_truth: $35 merchandise subtotal, calculated before tax and after discounts

query: How fast is expedited shipping?
ground_truth: 2 to 3 business days, costing $9.99

query: Which countries does Zava ship to internationally?
ground_truth: Canada and Mexico only

query: When is a package considered lost?
ground_truth: When tracking shows no movement for 10 business days past the SLA, or the carrier confirms loss

query: How long is the warranty on a laptop?
ground_truth: 12 months for Electronics, covering manufacturing defects and hardware failure under normal use

query: What does ZavaCare extend the warranty to?
ground_truth: 36 months, adding accidental damage protection with up to two claims per year

query: My item is outside the return window but broke on its own. Any options?
ground_truth: Yes - a warranty claim is separate from a return. An item can be outside the return window but still within warranty

query: Does the warranty cover dropping my phone in water?
ground_truth: No. Accidental damage and liquid damage are not covered by the standard warranty

query: What is the employee discount on electronics?
ground_truth: 10 percent

query: Can I combine the employee discount with a promotional discount?
ground_truth: No. Discounts cannot be combined; the customer receives the single largest discount, not the sum

query: A competitor dropped their price two days after I bought. Will Zava match it?
ground_truth: No. Only Zava's own price drops qualify post-purchase, within 14 days. Competitor price drops after purchase do not qualify

query: Zava's own price dropped 5 days after my order. Can I get the difference?
ground_truth: Yes - a one-time adjustment is available if Zava's price drops within 14 days of purchase

query: What is Zava's policy on cryptocurrency payments?
ground_truth: UNANSWERABLE - not covered in any policy document

query: How many vacation days do employees get?
ground_truth: UNANSWERABLE - not covered in any policy document
